tags.name: `mc-menu`
tags.description:
Purpose: Dropdown menu for navigation and actions
Category: Navigation, Actions
When to use: When you need to provide a list of actions or links in a compact space.
When not to use: When you need to display a large amount of content or complex layouts.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-list, mc-popover, mc-top-bar
Alternative component names: Dropdown, Context Menu, Action Menu, Options Menu, Flyout Menu

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the content of the list goes, including list items or dividers.

  * `trigger` {} - The trigger slot where the element which triggers the menu must go.

Attributes:

  * `arrow` {`boolean`} - Show or hide arrow in the triggering element. Set to false by default.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the component.

  * `maxwidth` {`string | undefined`} - Max width of pop-up.

  * `maxheight` {`string | undefined`} - Max height of pop-up.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Show opo-up on first render. Set to false by default.

  * `disablecloseonselect` {boolean} - Disables auto close functionality of the menu when list item is selected.
When set to true, the menu will not close automatically when an item is selected.

  * `position` {`Position`} - The placement of the popover. Note that popover will flip to the opposite position if it does not have enough space.

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Determines the events that cause the tippy to show. Multiple event names are separated by spaces i.e. `click focus`.

  * `contextmenuonside` {`boolean`} - If true, the menu will be shown on the side of the trigger element when the trigger is `contextmenu`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two menus or a menu and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

Properties:

  * `mcList` {`McList[] | undefined`} - 

  * `triggerElements` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `mcPopover` {`IMcPopover | undefined`} - 

  * `arrow` {`boolean`} - Show or hide arrow in the triggering element. Set to false by default.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the component.

  * `maxwidth` {`string | undefined`} - Max width of pop-up.

  * `maxheight` {`string | undefined`} - Max height of pop-up.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Show opo-up on first render. Set to false by default.

  * `disablecloseonselect` {boolean} - Disables auto close functionality of the menu when list item is selected.
When set to true, the menu will not close automatically when an item is selected.

  * `position` {`Position`} - The placement of the popover. Note that popover will flip to the opposite position if it does not have enough space.

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Determines the events that cause the tippy to show. Multiple event names are separated by spaces i.e. `click focus`.

  * `contextmenuonside` {`boolean`} - If true, the menu will be shown on the side of the trigger element when the trigger is `contextmenu`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two menus or a menu and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

attributes.name: arrow
attributes.description:
`arrow` {`boolean`} - Show or hide arrow in the triggering element. Set to false by default.

Property: arrow

Default: false

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the component.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: maxwidth
attributes.description:
`maxwidth` {`string | undefined`} - Max width of pop-up.

Property: maxwidth

attributes.name: maxheight
attributes.description:
`maxheight` {`string | undefined`} - Max height of pop-up.

Property: maxheight

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
`open` {`boolean`} - Show opo-up on first render. Set to false by default.

Property: open

Default: false

attributes.name: disablecloseonselect
attributes.description:
`disablecloseonselect` {boolean} - Disables auto close functionality of the menu when list item is selected.
When set to true, the menu will not close automatically when an item is selected.

Property: disablecloseonselect

Default: false

attributes.name: position
attributes.description:
`position` {`Position`} - The placement of the popover. Note that popover will flip to the opposite position if it does not have enough space.

Property: position

Default: bottom-left

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description:
`trigger` {`string`} - Determines the events that cause the tippy to show. Multiple event names are separated by spaces i.e. `click focus`.

Property: trigger

Default: click

attributes.name: contextmenuonside
attributes.description:
`contextmenuonside` {`boolean`} - If true, the menu will be shown on the side of the trigger element when the trigger is `contextmenu`.

Property: contextmenuonside

Default: false

attributes.name: zindex
attributes.description:
`zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two menus or a menu and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

Property: zindex
